summary: Completed backend testing for KN_17 CRM Enforcements + Incentive/Tier Schema UI Editor. All 16 backend API tests passed successfully. Frontend testing encountered navigation issues preventing full UI validation.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to navigate to CRM module via Playwright - PENJUALAN sidebar group and Pelanggan/CRM links not accessible via automated testing
integration_issues.note: This appears to be a test automation issue rather than a functional bug. Manual testing or improved selectors needed.

passed_tests: Backend: Login (all roles - admin, manager, sales)
Backend: GET /api/sales-users - retrieve sales users list
Backend: GET /api/customers - retrieve customers including 'Butik Bali Indah'
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id}/credit-status?amount=X - credit gate API returns blocked:true for over-limit customer
Backend: POST /api/sales-orders - returns 409 CREDIT_BLOCKED with structured detail for over-limit customer
Backend: POST /api/collection-reminders/mark - marks reminder as contacted
Backend: GET /api/sales/kpi - retrieves sales KPI (total_sales, total_collected, ar_outstanding, customers_count, orders_count)
Backend: GET /api/sales/commission - retrieves commission calculation (base_amount, target_amount, achievement_pct, applied_rate, total_incentive)
Backend: GET /api/sales/commission-history - retrieves 6 periods of commission history
Backend: GET /api/sales/leaderboard - retrieves sales leaderboard (manager only)
Backend: POST /api/sales-targets - creates sales target (admin/manager only)
Backend: POST /api/sales-targets - returns 403 for sales role (role scoping enforced)
Backend: POST /api/sales-incentives - creates incentive scheme with tiers (admin/manager only)
Backend: POST /api/sales-incentives - returns 403 for sales role (role scoping enforced)
action_item_for_main_agent: Backend APIs are fully functional and tested. Frontend UI components exist (based on code review) but automated navigation testing encountered issues accessing the CRM module through the sidebar. Recommend: 1) Manual verification of CRM module navigation and UI functionality, OR 2) Provide specific navigation instructions/selectors for the PENJUALAN sidebar group expansion and CRM module access for automated testing.
